children.name: Charistephane
children.description: Charistephane — a genus of mertensiid comb jellies in the family Mertensiidae.

children.name: Callianira
children.description: Callianira — a genus of mertensiid comb jellies in the family Mertensiidae.

children.name: Callianira antarctica
children.description: Callianira antarctica is a species of ctenophore that physically resembles Mertensia ovum, but lacks the oil sacs.

children.name: Callianira compressa
children.description: Callianira compressa — a species in the genus Callianira, family Mertensiidae. Also known as mertensiid comb jellies.

children.description: Callianira cristata is a species of ctenophore of the family Mertensiidae.
